title: 🔥宏观避险情绪主导
body: 市场处于宏观风险受抑阶段。BMRI 报 71 (RISK_OFF)，避险情绪浓厚。当前价格 $64,530 较 200 日成本倒挂 -16.9%，虽有估值支撑，但走势仍高度依赖油价与降息预期博弈。宏观流动性未松绑前，反弹难以持续。中性。流动性拐点何时确认？
body_en: Market is in a macro risk-suppressed phase. BMRI sits at 71 (RISK_OFF)—risk-off sentiment is heavy. Price at $64,530 is trading -16.9% below the 200-day cost basis. While valuation offers support, price action remains highly dependent on the tug-of-war between oil prices and rate cut expectations. Without macro liquidity loosening, any rebound is unsustainable. Neutral. When will the liquidity inflection point be confirmed?
